Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Location Bulk Assignments and validate the user can assign the location
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Multiple persons exist in search results without location assignments.
ShortDescription: AC: Validate Location Bulk Assignment fields and assignment. PBI 915981 - List NOT refreshed and selections retained after operation.
Description: AC: Validate Assignment Type. Location. Effective Start Date. Note fields. Complete assignment and verify list NOT refreshed. Selections retained. Verify via person profile. PBI 915981.

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Assign Location button in the Bulk Assignments list
Validate the Assignment Type is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available Assignment Types
Validate the Location is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the list of available locations
Validate Effective Start Date is a required date field
Validate Note is a text field which only allows 10000 characters by attempting to add more and receiving an error message
Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue
Step Expected: A confirmation modal displays with the text: You are about to assign a location to the selected member records. Would you like to continue?

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button
Verify the Bulk Assignments list is NOT refreshed after closing the modal
Step Expected: Grid displays same data as before - no reload or flicker occurred (PBI 915981)

Step Action: Verify previously selected records remain selected
Step Expected: All previously selected records are still selected with same selection count (PBI 915981)

Step Action: Click Open Person Profile button for one of the selected persons
Navigate to Location Assignment section in person profile
Verify the assigned location appears in the persons location assignments
Step Expected: The location assigned in step 9 is displayed as an active assignment for the person

Step Action: Logout of the testing environment

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Staff Member Bulk Assignments and validate the user can assign the staff

Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Location Bulk Unassignments and validate the user can unassign the location
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Persons with existing location assignments exist in search results.
ShortDescription: AC: Validate Location Bulk Unassignment fields and unassignment. PBI 915981 - List NOT refreshed and selections retained after operation.
Description: AC: Validate Discharge Reason. Other Discharge Reason. Notes fields. Complete unassignment and verify list NOT refreshed. Selections retained. Verify removal via person profile. PBI 915981.

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Unassign Location button in the Bulk Assignments list

Validate the Discharge Reason is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the values: Deceased. Required higher level of care. Declined Services. Terminated Services. Transferred. Other.
Validate if Discharge Reason is Other the Other (Discharge Reason) single select drop down field is displayed which is a required field
Validate Notes is a text field which only allows 10000 characters by attempting to add more and receiving an error message
Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue
Step Expected: A confirmation modal displays with the text: You are about to unassign location from the selected member records. Would you like to continue?

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button
Verify the Bulk Assignments list is NOT refreshed after closing the modal
Step Expected: Grid displays same data as before - no reload or flicker occurred (PBI 915981)

Step Action: Verify previously selected records remain selected
Step Expected: All previously selected records are still selected with same selection count (PBI 915981)

Step Action: Click Open Person Profile button for one of the selected persons
Navigate to Location Assignment section in person profile
Verify the location assignment has been removed or end-dated
Step Expected: The previously assigned location no longer appears as active assignment

Step Action: Logout of the testing environment

Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate the fields in Staff Member Bulk Unassignments and validate the user can unassign the staff
Preconditions: User has bulk assignment privileges. Persons with existing staff assignments exist in search results.
ShortDescription: AC: Validate Staff Bulk Unassignment fields and unassignment. PBI 915981 - List NOT refreshed and selections retained after operation.
Description: AC: Validate Unassign Reason. Other Unassign Reason. Notes fields. Complete unassignment and verify list NOT refreshed. Selections retained. Verify removal via person profile. PBI 915981.

Step Action: Login to the test environment
Step Expected: User is logged in and the Home page displays

Step Action: Navigate to the 3 dot ellipsis menu and click Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments List page displays

Step Action: Fill in the required fields as desired for the test and click on Run Query
Step Expected: Bulk Assignments List page displays with the filtered records

Step Action: Select 1 or more records and click on the Unassign Staff button in the Bulk Assignments list
Step Expected: Staff Member Bulk Unassignments modal displays

Step Action: Validate the Unassign Reason is a required field which is a single select drop down that displays the values: Deceased. Department involuntarily ends services/termination due to no contact. Moved out of State and chose to terminate services. Moved to Nursing Facility. No longer chooses to receive services. No longer eligible for Medicaid. Other. Services not used. Termination of Gx/Cx and does not receive services.
Validate if Unassign Reason is Other the Other (Unassign Reason) single select drop down field is displayed which is a required field

Fill in data in all the required fields and click on Continue

Step Action: Click on Continue and validate the status of the assignment is displayed
Click on the Close button
Verify the Bulk Assignments list is NOT refreshed after closing the modal
Step Expected: Grid displays same data as before - no reload or flicker occurred (PBI 915981)

Step Action: Verify previously selected records remain selected
Step Expected: All previously selected records are still selected with same selection count (PBI 915981)

Step Action: Click Open Person Profile button for one of the selected persons
Navigate to Staff Assignment section in person profile
Verify the staff assignment has been removed or end-dated
Step Expected: The previously assigned staff member no longer appears as active assignment

Step Action: Logout of the testing environment
